name: Pothos Potted Artificial Plant - Room Essentials™
description:
Lend a lovely look to your indoor space with this Pothos Potted Artificial Plant from Room Essentials™. This artificial arrangement features a realistic-looking trailing pothos plant, and it comes housed in a white melamine pot with faux soil filler for instant display. Place it on a side or console table with other real or faux plants to create a relaxing indoor garden.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
